Container.Name: ServerFoundary
Container.Overview: ServerFoundary (a.k.a. GameServerOS) — a self-hosted web platform for deploying game servers with one command. Dashboard + WebSocket agent endpoint in one container. Requires a Postgres database (use the official postgres:16 template).
Container.Description: A dark-mode dashboard to deploy, monitor, and control game servers (Valheim, CS2, Project Zomboid, 7 Days to Die, Terraria, ...) from a browser. Install the agent on any Ubuntu server with one curl command and it auto-enrolls with this dashboard.

Config.Name: Public App URL
Config.Description: External URL of the dashboard as reached by agents/browsers. Used in the one-command install script.

Config.Name: Public Agent WS URL
Config.Description: External URL of the WebSocket server. In production put a reverse proxy in front and use wss://.
